User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the VOYIQ application, storing their profile information and default preferences.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

defaultDietPreference.description: The user's default dietary preference (e.g., Vegetarian, Vegan, Non-veg, Halal, No preference).

defaultPacePreference.description: The user's default travel pace preference (e.g., Relaxed, Balanced, Packed).

defaultTravelStyleIds.description: An array of the user's default travel style preferences (e.g., Adventure, Culture, Food, Nature, Luxury, Budget).

tripsCreatedIds.description: References to trips created and owned by this user. (Relationship: User 1:N Trip)

collaboratingTripIds.description: References to trips where this user is a collaborator. (Relationship: User N:N Trip)

Trip.title: Trip
Trip.description: Represents a single travel plan created by a user, including destination, dates, budget, and preferences.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Trip entity.

ownerId.description: Reference to the User who created and owns this trip. (Relationship: User 1:N Trip)

origin.description: The starting city or airport for the traveler.

destination.description: The primary destination city or region for the trip.

startDate.description: The start date of the trip.

endDate.description: The end date of the trip.

groupType.description: The type of group traveling (e.g., solo, couple, family, friends).

numTravelers.description: The total number of travelers for this trip.

budgetTotal.description: The total budget allocated for the entire trip.

budgetCurrency.description: The currency of the budget (e.g., INR).

travelStyleIds.description: An array of chosen travel styles for this trip (e.g., Adventure, Culture, Food, Nature, Luxury, Budget).

pace.description: The preferred travel pace for this trip (e.g., Relaxed, Balanced, Packed).

dietPreference.description: The dietary preference for this trip (e.g., Vegetarian, Vegan, Non-veg, Halal, No preference).

mobilityNeeds.description: Indicates if there are any specific mobility needs for the travelers.

mustIncludePlaces.description: Free text field for places or activities that must be included in the itinerary.

mustAvoidPlaces.description: Free text field for places or activities that must be avoided in the itinerary.

collaboratorIds.description: References to Users who are collaborators on this trip. (Relationship: Trip N:N User)

status.description: The current status of the trip (e.g., draft, active, completed).

totalCompletedSlots.description: Total number of checked-off activities across all days.

ItineraryDay.title: ItineraryDay
ItineraryDay.description: Represents a single day within a trip's generated itinerary, including daily details and weather.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ItineraryDay entity.

tripId.description: Reference to the Trip this itinerary day belongs to. (Relationship: Trip 1:N ItineraryDay)

dayNumber.description: The sequential number of the day within the trip (e.g., 1 for day one).

date.description: The specific date for this itinerary day.

theme.description: A brief theme or summary generated by AI for the day's activities.

weatherCondition.description: A summary of the weather condition for the day (e.g., 'clear sky', 'rain').

weatherTempHigh.description: The estimated high temperature for the day in Celsius.

weatherTempLow.description: The estimated low temperature for the day in Celsius.

ItinerarySlot.title: ItinerarySlot
ItinerarySlot.description: Represents a single activity or event within an itinerary day's timeline.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ItinerarySlot entity.

itineraryDayId.description: Reference to the ItineraryDay this slot belongs to. (Relationship: ItineraryDay 1:N ItinerarySlot)

time.description: The time of day or specific hour for the activity (e.g., 'morning', '10:00 AM').

activity.description: The name or title of the planned activity.

description.description: A detailed description of the activity.

location.description: The name of the location for the activity.

latitude.description: The geographical latitude of the activity location.

longitude.description: The geographical longitude of the activity location.

estimatedCostINR.description: The estimated cost of the activity in INR.

durationMinutes.description: The estimated duration of the activity in minutes.

category.description: The category of the activity (e.g., Food, Transport, Stay, Activities, Misc).

tips.description: Helpful tips or notes related to the activity.

completed.description: Whether the user has finished this activity.

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: Represents a single financial expense logged by a user against a specific trip's budget.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Expense entity.

tripId.description: Reference to the Trip this expense belongs to. (Relationship: Trip 1:N Expense)

category.description: The category of the expense (e.g., Food, Transport, Stay, Activities, Misc).

amount.description: The monetary amount of the expense.

note.description: An optional note or description for the expense.

loggedByUserId.description: Reference to the User who logged this expense. (Relationship: User 1:N Expense)

loggedAt.description: The timestamp when the expense was logged.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Represents a single message within the AI chat companion for a specific trip.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChatMessage entity.

tripId.description: Reference to the Trip this chat message belongs to. (Relationship: Trip 1:N ChatMessage)

role.description: The role of the sender (e.g., 'user' or 'assistant').

content.description: The actual text content of the message.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the message was sent or received.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user.

params.name: tripId
params.description: The unique ID of the trip.
